images.prompt: Cinematic widescreen photograph (16:9) for a residential cleaning service homepage hero. A freshly cleaned, sunlit living room in a Denver home — cool daylight streaming through tall bay windows, a light linen sofa, a pale wood coffee table, a just-vacuumed pale-grey rug, an indoor plant, a warm spring-green throw cushion as a colour accent. The room reads 'a professional cleaner just left' — polished surfaces, fluffed cushions, no clutter. Palette: cool off-white walls, soft mist-grey floors, one fresh spring-green accent, one sky-blue vase or book. Editorial-documentary, not staged. No people in frame. Avoid: beige / cream / mustard / navy palette; spa-candle aesthetic; 'happy maid in apron' stock photo cliché; cartoon sparkle effects.

Landscape photograph (16:9) of a realistically messy but not disgusting residential kitchen at mid-day, cool daylight through a window. A stack of dirty plates beside the sink, coffee rings on the counter, breadcrumbs, an open kettle, a half-empty glass, light grease splatter on the backsplash, tea-towel slumped on the worktop. The room is clearly lived-in but not in distress. Same camera angle and framing as the 'after.jpg' image (they will be composed as a before/after slider — shoot identical position, identical lighting). Palette: cool off-white cabinetry, pale grey worktop, warm-wood floor, natural daylight. Avoid: staged filth, roaches / dramatic grime, beige/cream/mustard/navy tones.

Landscape photograph (16:9) of the exact same kitchen as 'before.jpg' — identical camera position, identical framing, identical lighting — but spotless. Every surface cleared and wiped. Dishes washed and put away. Counters bare except for a small indoor plant and a folded crisp cloth. Stovetop gleaming, backsplash clean, sink empty and polished. Natural cool daylight through the same window. Palette: cool off-white cabinetry, pale grey worktop, warm-wood floor, one fresh spring-green herb plant as accent. Critical: must match 'before.jpg' camera angle precisely — this is a before/after slider. Avoid: any difference in framing or lighting; over-staged magazine-spread styling; beige/mustard/navy tones.

Landscape photograph (3:2) representing a 'standard clean' — a tidy, just-vacuumed residential living room. Mid-day cool daylight, pale-grey sofa, a light wool rug with vacuum lines still visible, folded throw, cleared coffee table with a single glass of water, an indoor plant. The room feels reset but lived-in. Palette: cool off-white walls, mist-grey floors, one fresh spring-green accent (plant or throw). No people. Editorial-documentary tone. Avoid: beige/cream/mustard/navy palette, staged perfection.

Landscape photograph (3:2) representing a 'deep clean' — a close-up of a sparkling oven interior with the door open, racks clean, the glass window gleaming, a pair of pale-blue rubber-gloved hands just finishing wiping the top edge with a cream-white microfibre cloth. Cool interior light. Palette: cool stainless steel, off-white cabinetry, sky-blue gloves as accent. Documentary, detail-oriented. Avoid: product-ad glamour shot, beige/mustard/navy.

Landscape photograph (3:2) representing a 'move-in/out clean' — an empty residential apartment with no furniture, every surface clean, natural daylight pouring through bare windows onto a freshly mopped hardwood floor, cabinets open showing wiped-down interiors. The emptiness feels intentional and ready, not sad. Palette: cool off-white walls, pale wood floor, one spring-green plant on a windowsill as the only colour accent. Avoid: staged-real-estate vibe, beige/mustard/navy tones.

Landscape photograph (3:2) representing a 'post-construction clean' — a freshly renovated kitchen, brand-new cabinets and worktops still with faint construction dust in the corners, a cleaner in a cool-grey uniform wiping down the top of a window frame with a microfibre cloth, an industrial-grade HEPA vacuum just visible at the edge of frame. Cool daylight, pristine-but-dusty feel. Palette: cool off-white cabinets, pale worktop, sky-blue uniform as accent. Documentary. Avoid: heavy drywall mess, construction-site chaos, beige/mustard/navy.

Landscape photograph (4:3) of Amara Osei, founder of Sparkhaus, in her Denver office. Mid-40s Black woman in a simple cool-grey button-down and spring-green cardigan at a warm-wood desk, reviewing a printed client schedule with a pen in hand. Indoor plant on the windowsill, cool daylight from the left, a whiteboard with a weekly-rota grid softly visible behind her. Friendly, calm, not performing for the camera. Palette: cool off-white walls, wood desk, one spring-green cardigan as accent. Documentary tone. Avoid: corporate-headshot studio look, beige/mustard/navy, overly posed.

Square documentary photograph (1:1) for a cleaning-service credibility moment. A crisp white Sparkhaus-branded service cloth folded next to an unopened bottle of Green Seal-certified eco-friendly cleaner, a set of neatly arranged sky-blue rubber gloves, a laminated insurance-coverage card, and a ring of numbered smart-lock keycards on a pale-grey worktop. Cool daylight from above. The composition reads 'professional-trade-ready, not amateur.' Palette: cool off-white worktop, sky-blue gloves, spring-green label accent on the bottle, slate grey accents. No people. Avoid: consumer-household stock styling, beige/mustard/navy, gratuitous stacks of paperwork.

Square avatar portrait (1:1) of Amara Osei — mid-40s Black woman, founder and operations lead at Sparkhaus. Head-and-shoulders crop in her Denver office, a soft-focus whiteboard with schedules visible behind her. Cool daylight from the left, calm friendly expression. Simple cool-grey or spring-green top. Palette: cool off-white walls, spring-green accent. Documentary tone. Avoid: glam-studio backdrop, beige/mustard/navy.

Square avatar portrait (1:1) of Daniela Reyes — late-40s Latina woman, lead cleaner for deep cleans and move-in/out at Sparkhaus. Head-and-shoulders crop at the studio, a cleaning-supplies shelf softly visible behind her with Green Seal-certified bottles. Cool daylight, confident steady expression. Cool-grey Sparkhaus uniform polo. Palette: cool off-white shelves, sky-blue accents on bottles. Avoid: cleaning-model stock cliché, beige/mustard/navy.

Square avatar portrait (1:1) of Chris Pham — mid-30s Vietnamese-American man, lead cleaner for recurring clients at Sparkhaus. Head-and-shoulders crop in a Capitol Hill apartment mid-clean, a freshly-vacuumed rug softly visible behind him, a warm but professional expression. Cool daylight. Cool-grey Sparkhaus polo. Palette: cool off-white walls, pale wood floor in background, one spring-green plant accent. Avoid: posed product-shot, beige/mustard/navy.

Square avatar portrait (1:1) of Tess Kowalski — early-40s woman, lead cleaner for post-construction jobs at Sparkhaus. Head-and-shoulders crop on a job site, wearing a dust-protective headband pushed back and a cool-grey work shirt, a HEPA vacuum and a clean power-drill on a pristine worktop behind her in soft focus. Calm, capable expression. Cool daylight. Palette: cool off-white cabinets, sky-blue tool accents. Avoid: construction-heroism stock, beige/mustard/navy.

Landscape photograph (4:3) of a friendly Sparkhaus cleaner arriving at a Denver residential front door at mid-morning — standing on the welcome mat with a neatly organised supplies tote (spring-green-labelled eco bottles, microfibre cloths, a folded cool-grey apron), a phone in hand showing the day's schedule. The cleaner is in a cool-grey Sparkhaus polo, visible from the shoulders down (faceless — the welcome arrival moment, not a portrait). Cool daylight, a pale-wood front door with a spring-green wreath or plant. Palette: cool off-white walls, spring-green accents, sky-blue reflections. Friendly arrival moment. Avoid: 'maid in apron' stock cliché, aggressive salesperson vibe, beige/mustard/navy.
